A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
Using query_db:82 and query_db:36, the agent’s execute_python:86 grouped results by the text field "histological_type" (rather than the ICD-O-3 "icd_o_3_histology" codes) and selected patients with "histological_type" ILIKE '%gliom%', which pulled in non-LGG cases (e.g., "Paraganglioma; Extra-adrenal Pheochromocytoma"), resulting in categories and averages that do not match the ground-truth ICD-O-3-based results.
